payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No query was run and no memory cards were created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an admin SQL/debug command, not a durable user memory claim. SQL execution is disabled by BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Detected admin SQL request: SELECT * FROM memory_cards

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate debug environment before attempting admin SQL commands.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug inspection commands if available.
